Underworld: Evolution (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $62,318,875Details
International Box Office $51,098,887
Worldwide Box Office $113,417,762
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $47,442,568
Total $47,442,568
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$26,857,181 (43.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:54.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,207 opening theaters/3,207 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $113,791,411

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 20th, 2006 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: June 6th, 2006 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment, released as Underworld - Evolution
MPA Rating: R for pervasive strong violence and gore, some sexuality/nudity and language.
Franchise: Underworld
Plot point: Monster, Vampire, Werewolf
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production Countries: United States
